name: flatpickr

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need range selection, an always-open inline calendar, date plus time, or consistent styling/localization. Skip it when one plain date is enough and native <input type=date> is acceptable -- its value is in range/inline/time.
en.why_valuable: A correct date/time picker (calendar grid, range selection, time, min/max, disabled dates, localization, keyboard navigation) is surprisingly large and error-prone; native <input type=date> cannot select ranges/times inside an inline calendar, and browsers render it inconsistently.

data_in.note: flatpickr(element, options) returns an Instance; the consumer AI receives selections through onChange(selectedDates, dateStr). The calendar appends to document.body by default -- inside shadow, set static:true (or inline:true) so it stays in the shadow. The default export is the flatpickr function.

schema.element: HTMLInputElement | HTMLElement -- required binding target (first constructor argument)
schema.defaultDate?: string | Date | Array -- none by default
schema.static?: boolean -- default false (calendar appends to body); must be true inside shadow to keep the calendar in the shadow

spec.note: The input itself is about 36px high; inline/static calendars are about 308px. Do not use vh.

when_to_use: 需要范围选择、始终展开的内联日历、日期+时间、或要一致样式/本地化时用它;若单个纯日期够用且原生 <input type=date> 可接受就跳过——它的价值在 range/inline/time。
why_valuable: 一个正确的日期/时间选择器(日历网格、范围选择、时间、min/max、禁用日期、本地化、键盘导航)出乎意料地庞大易错;原生 <input type=date> 做不了范围/内联/日历内选时,且各浏览器渲染不一。

data_in.note: flatpickr(element, options) 返回 Instance;选中结果经 onChange(selectedDates, dateStr) 回调交消费 AI。默认日历 append 到 document.body——shadow 内须设 static:true(或 inline:true)使日历留在 shadow。default 导出 flatpickr 函数。

schema.element: HTMLInputElement | HTMLElement —— 必填绑定目标(构造第一参)
schema.inline?: boolean —— 始终展开日历,默认 false
schema.static?: boolean —— 默认 false(日历 append 到 body);shadow 内须 true 使日历留在 shadow

spec.note: input 本身约 36px;inline/static 模式日历约 308px;禁 vh。

uplink: 选中日期由消费 AI 在 onChange(selectedDates, dateStr) 回调里取用并按载体外传;不预设统一契约。

carriers.widget: conditional:flatpickr.min.css 落 shadow + static:true/inline:true 使日历留在 shadow(否则默认 append 到 body)
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN,无 worker/wasm/uplink 硬依赖

isolation.evidence: +esm default export flatpickr(export{y as default});flatpickr(element, options):Instance 已验证;Options mode('single'|'multiple'|'range'|'time')/dateFormat/defaultDate/minDate/maxDate/enableTime/inline/noCalendar/locale 见 dist/types/options.d.ts。globalDomMutation=yes 且 shadowCompatible=conditional:默认(非 inline、非 static)把 calendarContainer append 到 document.body(dist/esm/index.js:413-415;document.body ×6)——设 static:true 或 inline:true 使日历渲染在 shadow 内的包裹容器。globalEvents=yes:bind(window,'resize') + bind(window.document,'touchstart'/'mousedown'/'focus',documentClick) 做外部点击关闭(index.js:281-286),destroy() 移除。globalStyleInjection=conditional:bundle 内含 document.createElement('style')→document.head.appendChild 辅助(压缩源 He()),主题另为外链 dist/flatpickr.min.css(200)。
